summary: The diff implements most requirements well: frontend puzzle game with 4x4 grid, move counter, timer, win detection, leaderboard, arcade-retro theme, and a backend. However, the backend function names differ from the spec (getTopScores/clearScores instead of getLeaderboard/clearLeaderboard), scores persistence across upgrades is not implemented (uses mutable in-memory list without stable storage), and no generated logo image asset is present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes getLeaderboard and clearLeaderboard functions (exact names per AC)
missing_requirements.reason: The backend implements getTopScores and clearScores instead of getLeaderboard and clearLeaderboard as specified in the AC.
The backend uses a mutable in-memory List with no stable variable declaration or pre/postupgrade hooks, so scores will be lost on canister upgrades.

missing_requirements.requirement: Logo image served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated (puzzle-logo.dim_256x256.png)
missing_requirements.reason: No image file is added under frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff. The App.tsx references the image path but the actual generated image asset is not present.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity login/authentication integration via useInternetIdentity hook and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the app
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists user authentication or Internet Identity integration as a non-goal, yet the frontend wires up InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity for actor creation.

hallucinated_features.description: A third How To Play tab in addition to Game and Leaderboard tabs
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec only requires a game view and a leaderboard view. A third How To Play tab was added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Scanlines CSS overlay effect on the puzzle grid
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not mention scanlines; this decorative effect was added beyond what was requested.
